content.name: Pokey's Hull Mod Rebalance
content.description: Rebalances hull (ship) equipment mods into real choices. No roll RNG (every value pinned), four clear archetypes per tier (Racer, Tank, Ghost, Explorer), and non-speed roles buffed so speed no longer wins every slot. Max hull rider means higher tiers always upgrade. Numbers only, savegame-safe. Other mods untouched.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Hull Mod Rebalance
text.description: Rebalances hull (ship) equipment mods into real choices. No roll RNG (every value pinned), four clear archetypes per tier (Racer, Tank, Ghost, Explorer), and non-speed roles buffed so speed no longer wins every slot. Max hull rider means higher tiers always upgrade. Numbers only, savegame-safe. Other mods untouched.
text.author: Pokey
